chunks.text: This guide describes the process for obtaining the degree of Doctor of Philosophy (Ph.D.) in EECS. The Ph.D. milestone chart below provides an overview of the necessary steps you will need to take before getting your Ph.D. Please contact the Staff Graduate Advisors (Electrical Engineering (EE): grads-ee@berkeley.edu, 217 Cory Hall / Computer Science (CS): grads-cs@berkeley.edu, 367 Soda Hall) to obtain any forms and additional information, or if you have any questions. The complete set of EECS policies and procedures can be found in the Graduate Handbook.

The Ph.D. milestone chart includes: Ph.D. Coursework, Ph.D. EE and CS Prelim Exam Preparation, Ph.D. Qualifying Examination, Ph.D. Teaching Requirement, Ph.D. Student Review, Ph.D. Petitions, Ph.D. Graduation and Filing, and Ph.D. Post-Graduation Guide.
